title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Cardnet Payments Ltd
body: "Application number 5071  Applicant Lloyds Bank Plc objected to the name used by Cardnet Payments Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 27 February 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Cardnet Payments Ltd is changed to 15659264, LTD. "
